languages.text: "Вы знаете, что Зауэрбэки теперь — дворянский род?"
"Do you know that the Sauerbacks are now a noble house?"
languages.original_text: "Вы знаете, что Зауэрбэки теперь — дворянский род?"

traits.locale_text: "Do you know that the Sauerbacks are now a noble house?"
"Do you know that the Sauerbacks are now a noble house?"
"Do you know that the Sauerbacks are now a noble house?"
"Do you know that the Sauerbacks are now a noble house?"

languages.text: "Wusstet Ihr, dass die Sauerbacks mittlerweile ein Adelshaus sind?"
languages.original_text: "Do you know that the Sauerbacks are now a noble house?"

traits.locale_text: "Wusstet Ihr, dass die Sauerbacks mittlerweile ein Adelshaus sind?"

languages.text: « Savez-vous que les Sauerback ont fini par devenir une maison noble ? »
languages.original_text: "Do you know that the Sauerbacks are now a noble house?"

traits.locale_text: « Savez-vous que les Sauerback ont fini par devenir une maison noble ? »

languages.text: «¿Sabía que los Sauerback son ahora una casa noble?».
languages.original_text: "Do you know that the Sauerbacks are now a noble house?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Sabía que los Sauerback son ahora una casa noble?».

languages.text: "Sauerbacklerin artık soylu bir hane olduğunu biliyor musun?"
languages.original_text: "Do you know that the Sauerbacks are now a noble house?"

traits.locale_text: "Sauerbacklerin artık soylu bir hane olduğunu biliyor musun?"

languages.text: “你知道苏尔贝克家现在成了贵族吗？”
languages.original_text: "Do you know that the Sauerbacks are now a noble house?"

traits.locale_text: “你知道苏尔贝克家现在成了贵族吗？”

languages.text: 「ザウアーバック家は今や貴族の家になったことを知っていますか」
languages.original_text: "Do you know that the Sauerbacks are now a noble house?"

traits.locale_text: 「ザウアーバック家は今や貴族の家になったことを知っていますか」
